sep='\n'

    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-25 | 05:44 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_real_response_retry.json')

created_files=[]

    status='triad_present_protocol_next'

elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_dispatch_result_probe.json')

    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing Claude runtime state after BEM-842','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 retry real Claude response; blocker files not accepted','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_state'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-842 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'bem842_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the next repair selected by BEM-842 by queueing the missing-proof probe')
